overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with red hair exploring a vibrant futuristic city. The character walks along neon-lit streets, crosses intersections, descends stairs to lower levels, and explores plazas with futuristic architecture and parked vehicles under a partly cloudy sky.

pedestrian walking in the same direction ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city sidewalk with red pavement, passing striped concrete barriers and a pink food stall. Trash bags litter the ground near the curb, while neon signs and an elevated highway are visible in the distance.

character turns toward the stairway and begins descending to lower levels

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and approaching a stairway leading down to lower city levels

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes, passing a police officer on the left. The camera turns toward a concrete stairway descending to lower levels, with futuristic glass towers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway and stairs descending to lower plaza

pedestrian walking in the distance under the overpass

building with orange roof and red signage

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete stairway into a lower city level, passing under an elevated highway. A child runs up the stairs in the opposite direction. The area features orange building structures and digital billboards under partial cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower city plaza with futuristic architecture and benches

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower plaza examining the futuristic architecture and digital signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking near the building entrance

wooden and concrete benches along the walkway

vertical neon sign reading HOTEL TENGU

segments.scene_description: The character explores an open plaza with distinctive teal and red buildings featuring geometric patterns. Concrete benches line the walkway, and multiple digital advertising screens display neon content. The area transitions from covered to open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with gas station and parked vehicles

events.description: approaching a parked futuristic sports car in the plaza
turning right to circle around the parked vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past the TURBO gas station and examining parked futuristic vehicles

pedestrian walking near the gas station

small red and white kiosk structure

segments.scene_description: The character explores an open plaza featuring a TURBO gas station with bright yellow signage. A sleek futuristic sports car is parked prominently in the center. The camera circles the vehicle while neon signs and hotel advertisements remain visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant futuristic city, transitioning from a cluttered street level down into a geometric urban plaza. It begins on a sidewalk with red pavement, passing a pink food stall and trash-strewn curbs beneath the shadow of an elevated highway. As the character crosses a wide intersection with yellow stripes, the camera shifts focus toward a concrete stairway that leads away from the towering glass skyscrapers and down to a lower city level. The scene then descends under the highway, passing a running child and orange structures, before opening up into a plaza defined by teal and red geometric buildings and glowing digital billboards. Finally, the environment expands into an open-air square where the camera circles a sleek sports car parked prominently before a bright yellow TURBO gas station.
